Together with researchers at Boston Children’s Hospital and Harvard, we published a study in NEJM AI showing how o3 Deep Research helped clinicians revisit previously unsolved rare pediatric disease cases, and find answers for families who had waited years.

discovery_record.discovery_title: OpenAI o3 研究助解罕见儿科病例
discovery_record.discovery_summary: 与波士顿儿童医院和哈佛的研究人员合作，我们在NEJM AI上发表了一项研究，展示了o3 Deep Research如何帮助临床医生重新审视此前未解决的罕见儿科疾病案例，并为等待多年的家庭找到答案。

key_excerpts.text: 与波士顿儿童医院和哈佛的研究人员合作，我们在NEJM AI上发表了一项研究，展示了o3 Deep Research如何帮助临床医生重新审视此前未解决的罕见儿科疾病案例，并为等待多年的家庭找到答案。

Post Log in Sign up Post OpenAI @OpenAI Together with researchers at Boston Children’s Hospital and Harvard, we published a study in NEJM AI showing how o3 Deep Research helped clinicians revisit previously unsolved rare pediatric disease cases, and find answers for families who had waited years.

case_details: 与波士顿儿童医院和哈佛的研究人员合作，我们在NEJM AI上发表了一项研究，展示了o3 Deep Research如何帮助临床医生重新审视此前未解决的罕见儿科疾病案例，并为等待多年的家庭找到答案。
